input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace/frontend && node -e "
const sharp = require('sharp');
sharp('/home/user/sandbox/workspace/.attachments/original.avif')
  .png()
  .toFile('./public/og-image.png')
  .then(info => console.log('Done:', JSON.stringify(info)))
  .catch(e => console.error('Error:', e.message));
" 2>&1
input.description: Convert avif to png with full path
